insight: A fully sealed local release can still be scientifically unpublishable. The pre-publication claim audit found a missed prior-baseline report in iter192 and a prospective protocol violation in iter195. Iter206's exact-delta rule correctly forced a stop before remote publication rather than allowing those corrections to be folded into a sealed recovery.
next_action: Do not publish, dispatch, rerun, or mutate iter206. Under iter207, preserve every original raw and superseded evidence byte; publish separate machine-checkable iter192 and iter195 corrections; carry the unchanged 50-row scientific plan; and consume at most one branch push and one two-parent merge before the exact-six admission gate permits at most one dispatch request.
